articles.title: Oil prices ease on hopes of new US-Iran peace talks - BBC
articles.description: Crude prices jumped above $100 on Monday after talks failed between the two sides at the weekend.

articles.title: The Nissan Rogue E-Power Is The Hybrid SUV We've Been Waiting For - Motor1.com
articles.description: The new Nissan Rogue E-Power Hybrid debuts with third-generation technology under the hood. It should make its way to the US in 2027.

articles.title: Inside Nissan's Comeback Plan: AI, Hybrids, And The Return Of The Xterra - Motor1.com
articles.description: Nissan is hoping to turn things around with its bold 'Nissan Vision' strategy, which includes AI, electrification, and more.

articles.title: Trump officials consider physician, a Fox News regular, for top vaccine post - The Washington Post
articles.description: Houman Hemmati is under consideration to lead the FDA’s Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research. A final decision has not been made.

articles.title: Supply shock coming as last oil tankers leaving Hormuz before Iran war to unload in next few days - Seeking Alpha
articles.description: The final oil tankers to traverse the Strait of Hormuz before the outbreak of war are set to reach refineries by April 20, which could begin physical shortages in Europe and the US.

articles.title: S&P 500 futures are little changed after index erases Iran war losses: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: Wall Street once again proved resilient in the face of increased geopolitical uncertainty.

articles.title: New Lauren Sánchez Bezos’ Profile Prompts Katie Couric To Ask The Question We’re All Thinking - HuffPost
articles.description: The New York Times published an article over the weekend titled, “Someone Has to Be Happy. Why Not Lauren Sánchez Bezos?”

articles.title: Goldman Sachs Reports Record Quarter in Banking and Trading - WSJ
articles.description: Shares in the bank fell, with fears about the Iran war’s impact on Wall Street overshadowing results in the first quarter

articles.title: Dell, HP Inc. Shares Jump on Acquisition Speculation Report - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Nvidia Corp. denied a report from website SemiAccurate that it was seeking an acquisition of a large company that would “reshape the PC landscape.”

articles.title: Top Biotech Catapults On 'Unprecedented' Results In Cancer - Investor's Business Daily
articles.description: The company is working in pancreatic cancer, a disease that's typically aggressive and difficult to treat.

articles.title: OpenAI rips Anthropic, distances itself from Microsoft - Axios
articles.description: OpenAI is tightening its ties with Amazon, saying its early investor and partner Microsoft was holding it back.

articles.title: LinkedIn is quietly testing a new AI job marketplace where workers can earn up to $150 an hour - Business Insider
articles.description: LinkedIn is launching an AI labor marketplace, offering up to $150 an hour for AI training, challenging startups like Mercor and Surge AI.

articles.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else - TechCrunch
articles.description: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.
